name: io.github.cbetz/last-ehr
title: Last EHR — Medplum
description: Read-only Medplum chart search and patient context for MCP clients.

environmentVariables.name: MEDPLUM_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: A least-privilege Medplum access token. Set this or the client credentials below.

environmentVariables.name: MEDPLUM_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Medplum ClientApplication ID. Set with MEDPLUM_CLIENT_SECRET when not using an access token.

environmentVariables.name: MEDPLUM_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Medplum ClientApplication secret. Set with MEDPLUM_CLIENT_ID when not using an access token.

environmentVariables.name: MEDPLUM_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional base URL for a self-hosted Medplum deployment.
